docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SALINAS, BRIAN AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, EDUARDO ,AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SALINAS, BRIAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, EDUARDO ,AN INDIVIDUAL $6,287.66 PRINCIPAL, $190.99 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,703.65, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
NOTICE OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SALINAS, BRIAN AS TO ASSIGNEE DAEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS LABOR COMISSIONER'S OFFICE
